subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1920-09-07
subcodes.first_line: The body of man is from the world of nature. His body is akin to that of the animal. He has animal tendencies.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @man's distinction from the animal, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @second birth, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
